steps.name: epss-client
steps.summary: EpssClient with batch API lookup, offline fallback, and 10 unit tests (207 total pass)

steps.name: vuln-enrichment
steps.summary: EnrichedVulnerability model + VulnerabilityEnricher with EPSS×CVSS×PCI priority scoring, sort, and 8 unit tests (215 total pass)

steps.name: threat-model-format
steps.summary: ThreatModel/ThreatScenario/ThreatActor dataclasses + StaticThreatModelGenerator with EPSS-based scenario generation, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, controls gap calc, YAML export, and 6 unit tests (221 total pass)

steps.name: cli-integration
steps.summary: threat-model CLI command with SBOM→Grype→EPSS→ThreatModel pipeline, ADR-011, and 4 unit tests (225 total pass)
